template.name: Enterprise CSV Batch Processing Pipeline
template.description: High-performance CSV file processing template with validation, transformation, error handling, and batch optimization. Supports large files, custom schemas, and automated quality reports.

documentation.setup_guide:
1. Configure input, archive, and output directories
2. Set up database connection and output table
3. Define required columns and transformation rules
4. Configure notification channels
5. Test with sample CSV files
6. Monitor performance and adjust batch sizes
use_cases: Employee data imports and HR system updates
Customer data migration and CRM integration

troubleshooting.large_file_processing: Increase batch size and available memory allocation
troubleshooting.low_quality_scores: Review transformation rules and data validation logic
troubleshooting.high_error_rates: Check CSV format consistency and column mapping
troubleshooting.slow_processing: Optimize database connection pool and batch sizes
